# OpinCode v0.0.4

This release brings the new Xiaomi MiMo integration, maps custom Figma SVG icons for active providers, simplifies the provider landscape by removing deprecated options, and cleans up codebase typography.

## What is new

- **Xiaomi MiMo Provider**: Added native integration for Xiaomi MiMo and its official models: MiMo-V2.5-Pro, MiMo-V2.5, MiMo-V2-Pro, MiMo-V2-Flash, and MiMo-7B-RL.
- **Dynamic Endpoint Routing**: Automatically routes Xiaomi requests starting with `tp-` to the Singapore Token Plan API, and others to the standard pay-as-you-go API.
- **Figma Custom SVG Icons**: Mapped custom vector icons for all core providers: Google, Xiaomi, Claude (Anthropic), Ollama, DeepSeek, and OpenAI. These icons are loaded natively from the public directory with dark-mode responsive styling.
- **Unified Icon Views**: Integrated the custom SVG icon support across both the model settings selector and the active agent notification/toast layouts.
- **Provider Simplification**: Removed LM Studio support and deleted it from settings, autocomplete controls, and transport layers, keeping the workspace focused and clean.
- **Formatting Standards**: Removed em-dashes and emojis from model descriptions, labels, and status bar text.
